name: Spicy Hot Black Beans & Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (14.5 oz.) No Salt Added tomatoes, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray.
2. Add olive oil and place over medium heat until hot.
3. Add garlic and sauté until tender.
4. Add chopped tomatoes; reduce heat and cook uncovered for 6 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in black beans, ground red pepper, and cilantro.
6. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
7. Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired.
8. Serve over rice.
